Uchdrud is waiting somewhere by the North-gate of Bree for you to answer his challenge. You did as Butterbur asked and told Uchdrud to finish his beer…
Saeradan is at his cabin outside the town of Bree. You have done as Saeradan asked and should now return to him at his cabin.
